name: Vignesh Joshi
title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Software engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable backend systems and cloud-native applications. Passionate about clean code, DevOps practices, and solving real problems with simple solutions.

points: Led migration of monolithic services to microservices on Kubernetes, reducing deployment time by 60%
Designed and built REST APIs in Python (FastAPI) serving 2M+ requests per day
Mentored a team of 4 junior engineers through code reviews and weekly knowledge sessions
Built data pipelines using Apache Kafka and PostgreSQL for real-time analytics
Reduced API response time by 40% through query optimisation and Redis caching
Delivered a customer-facing dashboard in React + Django ahead of schedule

projects.name: k8s-mastery-guide
projects.description: Open-source Kubernetes reference with production-grade manifests, Helm charts, and a full troubleshooting guide.

projects.name: AI Resume Builder
projects.description: CLI tool that generates a styled PDF resume from a JSON file using Python and ReportLab.
